resources.string: Your porn blocker switch is on.
You have turned on the block all websites switch.
Your porn blocker switch is on, and this app is in your block apps list.
You have enabled instagram reels blocking.
You have enabled instagram search blocking.
You have enabled Snapchat spotlight blocking.
You have enabled Snapchat stories blocking.
You have enabled telegram search blocking.
You have enabled Whatsapp status blocking.
You have enabled youtube search blocking.
You have enabled youtube shorts blocking.
You have enabled image and video search blocking.
You have enabled in-app browser blocking for this app.
You have enabled make any browser supported blocking.
Your block new install app switch is on, and this app is in your new install app block list.
Your block notification drawer switch is on.
Your prevent uninstall switch is on.
Your focus mode session is running, and this app is not on your whitelist of focus mode apps.
Your title-based block setting is on.
Your block unsupported browsers switch is on, and this app is not in your whitelist unsupported browsers list.
Your block phone reboot switch is on.
Your block recent apps screen switch is on.
Are you finding protect.yourself helpful? Rate us!
Quick toggle for Stop Me focus mode

In order to block adult content on your device, protect.yourself will need this permission (accessibility services). protect.yourself will also be able to block specific websites/apps that you add to the list of blocked items with this permission.
In order to block adult content on your device, protect.yourself will need this permission (accessibility services).
protect.yourself uses a system-managed service called BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE. To enable blocking, turn this service on / restart it by turning it off and on again.
Go to More downloaded services -> protect.yourself
By checking this box, I grant protect.yourself permission to use the Accessibility service to block adult content.
Please read and check the box to turn on accessibility service.
Enter 2 valid DNS to overcome porn addiction. To identify this preset, you can enter any name in the name field.
There should be at least 2 character in the keyword.
Messages must contain at least 20 characters.
"Note: Add the 'Focus mode!' widget after watching the video."
"Note: Add the 'Streak' widget after watching the video."
By doing this, any unauthorized access to this app is prevented.
"The purpose of this is to backup your keywords, selected apps, and other items. So you don't have to setup the app again and again."
Sync and back up your data
Maintain a battery level of 20% or higher to keep protect.yourself running uninterrupted.
"If on, you won't be able to access any websites in supported browsers. You need to add a website to your whitelist in order to access it."
"If on, you can't search images and videos on supported browsers."
Add apps where you want to block in app browser. As this feature is in beta, it may not detect in-app browsers in all apps.
Newly installed apps will automatically be blocked if this setting is enabled. You can unblock an app by long clicking it.
Using this feature, you will not be able to open recent apps. However, before enabling it, please lock protect.yourself in recent apps.
As soon as we prevent you from accessing adult content, this number will increase by one.
"This feature does not allow you to open selected settings pages."
All browsers except supported ones will be blocked if the setting is On.
To dismiss a block screen, you can set a custom duration. Add at least 3 seconds and no more than 300 seconds.
This image will appear above the block screen message on the blocked screen.
In the blocked screen, this message will appear.
The block screen will appear when the app you added opens.
These are the apps we detect when some event is performed on your phone by them.
To create a preset, please enter DNS 1.
To create a preset, please enter DNS 2.
To create a preset, please enter your DNS name.
Active DNS cannot be edited or deleted.
Do you really want to delete your account? All data, including streak progress, will be cleared. Are you ready?
You will be able to be more productive with this.
If you have any suggestions or feedback for improving protect.yourself, please contact us by email.
Display pop-up window permissions are needed to block inappropriate content effectively with protect.yourself.
Please set protective Mode to modify any settings.
The request history for all types of protective Modes can be viewed here.
A switch/setting can only be disabled with the approval of a Protective Mode itself.
Kindly recommend some effective protective modes you would like to have in the app.
Give Suggestion on protect.yourself protective mode
The request to disable a switch/setting needs to be made after your real friend approved.
"Request already in progress. It can't be sent until first request is completed."
When inappropriate content is detected on these apps, block screens appear.
In these apps, block screens appear when inappropriate keywords are detected during search.
"By using VPN, you will be protected from adult content on all supported and unsupported browsers."
To use this feature, please set Real friend as your protective Mode.
Please disable long sentence to enable real friend as protective Mode.
Please disable time delay to enable real friend as protective Mode.
To change this setting, please set protective Mode as a long sentence.
Pending request of *** will approve after typing the correct sentence.
Pending request of *** will approve after real friend take approve action on mail.
To change this setting, please set protective Mode as time delay.
Pending request of *** will approve by $$$.
A solution is available to keep you safe from unauthorized access. This way, no one can enter the app without your permission. Would you like to enable it?
protect.yourself: Protect the app from unauthorized access.
We have a solution to prevent you from uninstalling protect.yourself. This will prevent excessive cravings and urges. Would you like to enable uninstall protection?
We have a solution: set up protective Modes. By doing so, you will be able to resist high urges more easily. Are you interested in enabling it?
DNS blocking is protecting you from adult content
